TE Customer Specific Operational Flow Order -- LIFTED EFF 1/21


Notice Text:

Effective 9:00 AM CCT January 21, 2026, Texas Eastern (TE) is lifting the previously posted Customer Specific Operational Flow Order effective January 14, 2026.

 

The previously posted Operational Flow Order for Market Area Zones M2-24, M2-30 and M3 remains in effect.

 

Please refer to the OFO table below for the effected TETCO zones, dates, and tolerance percentages.

 

Zone

Gas Day Jan 20

Gas Day Jan 21 and until further notice

M1-24"

No OFO

No OFO

M1-30"

No OFO

No OFO

M2-24"

OFO in Effect:

No Due Pipe 4%/250

OFO in Effect:

No Due Pipe 4%/250

M2-30"

OFO in Effect:

No Due Pipe 4%/250

OFO in Effect:

No Due Pipe 4%/250

M3

OFO in Effect:

No Due Pipe 4%/250

OFO in Effect:

No Due Pipe 4%/250

ETX

No OFO

No OFO

STX

No OFO

No OFO

WLA

No OFO

No OFO

ELA

No OFO

No OFO

Customer Specific

OFO in Effect:

No Due Pipe 4%/250

No OFO

 

 

NOTE:

Deliveries No DP : Shippers are not to take more than scheduled

Deliveries No DS : Shippers are not to take less than scheduled

Receipts No DP : Shippers are not to give less than scheduled

Receipts No DS : Shippers are not to give more than scheduled

 

Please contact your Operations Account Representative should you have any questions.



BackPrint
